description: Style Note A backpack easily distributes the weight across your shoulders and back, making loads easy to carry while keeping you looking cool and confident. Fill this versatile nike backpack with your laptop and office essentials, sportswear when you're heading to the field or gym, or use it on a trek in the great outdoors, and enjoy the ample storing space for all your gear. Product Details A patterned purple backpack with a brand patch appliquÃ© Two padded shoulder straps with one short handle on top and padded back One main zippered compartment with and internal laptop sleeve enough to hold a 15 inch laptop with a Velcro closure One zippered compartment in front with organiser pockets One small compartment at the back which opens on the right side Material and Care 100% polyester exterior, 100% nylon lining Do not machine wash or dry clean Do not bleach or iron Wipe with a damp cloth when necessary and line dry Size Height: 46 cm Width: 31 cm Depth: 19 cm
